# Fonderie

> Fonderie is an open-source skill and TypeScript SDK that lets AI coding assistants build SaaS products from proven, production-tested modules — login, payments, teams, permissions — instead of re-solving the same solved problems every session. Tokens go to the product, not plumbing.

Key facts:

- Fonderie Core is seventeen open-source building blocks (auth, billing, workspaces, permissions, and more) written in plain TypeScript.
- Self-hosted: the code runs on your server, with your data, and no vendor lock-in. Every module can be read, audited, and modified.
- Works with Claude Code natively, Cursor via rules, and Codex via AGENTS.md — any model that can read a repository can use the skill.
- Install: `npm install @fonderie/core`. Source: https://github.com/fonderie-js/sdk
- Connectors wire in external tools such as GitHub, Slack, Stripe, Linear, Notion, and Postgres.
- Identity (a real email and phone per agent) and Spend (per-agent, per-task budgets) are in development.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fonderiejs.com/): What Fonderie is and how it works, with FAQ
- [Platform](https://fonderiejs.com/platform): Platform overview — Core, Gateway, Connectors, Identity, Spend
- [Products](https://fonderiejs.com/products): The SDK and the cockpit
- [Blog](https://fonderiejs.com/blog): Notes from the foundry — measurements, molds, and the economics of AI-built SaaS
- [Token-cost experiment](https://fonderiejs.com/blog/token-cost-experiment): We measured Claude Code building auth from scratch vs from a Fonderie module — round one our module lost 2.3×; after fixing the three defects the measurement exposed, it won the rerun (cheaper, faster, 6× less code)
- [Resources](https://fonderiejs.com/help): Documentation, status, and support
- [Contact](https://fonderiejs.com/contact): Contact, press, and investors

## Code

- [Fonderie SDK on GitHub](https://github.com/fonderie-js/sdk): Open-source repository — the skill and the seventeen Core modules
